case_title: WONG, NELSON S VS PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE CO DBA SBC

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $514.94 FILED BY PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE CO DBA SBC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WONG, NELSON S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WONG, NELSON S AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE CO DBA SBC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, NELSON S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE CO DBA SBC $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $97.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,597.00, PLTF & DEFT ARE EACH 50% RESPPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE CO DBA SBC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE CO DBA SBC RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT WONG, NELSON S $257.47 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $279.47, CROSS DEFT WAIVES NO SERVICE ON THE CROSS COMPLAINT. CROSS COMPLAINANT AND CROSS DEFT ARE EACH 50% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF WONG, NELSON S
